data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time-off and PTO tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the time-off and PTO tracking functionality. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of time-off and PTO tracking functionality or related API endpoints to validate the requirement.
